title: Trebol Reveals the Monster Behind the Throne
description: Pages 14–17 focus on trebol reveals the monster behind the throne, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as law uses his hidden trump card against Doflamingo, but the tyrant's power keeps the final battle from ending.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What the hell is all this blood!? What happened to your arm!? 01! Get it together man!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You should be able to see that plain as day, no?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: that guy... he sure put a lot of faith in you...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He said you'd show us a miracle, straw hat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Fufuffeu! You don't seem like all that much based on that display back there... but nonetheless, come. There's two of us here standing just for you.

summary: Trebol Reveals the Monster Behind the Throne advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
